next_step_text: 6.4.26MF - Jeff B referenced that team is still reviewing responses to tally up scores and notify shortlisted participants. No response to Horizon or Calgary stampede invites sent out. 5.4.26MF - inviting SaskTel to Horizon in Sept 4.14.26MF - Jeffrey responded they're closing year end books and next steps will be decided late April/early May timeframe. 4.13.26 KK - emailed jeffrey to see next ste

buyer_dependent_items.text: Shortlist decision and vendor-presentation invitation SaskTel owes Zycus after down-selection

competitive_position.summary: SaskTel is running a four-vendor S2P RFP against Coupa, GEP Worldwide, JAGGAER, and SAP Ariba (SF Competitors__c). No competitor is confirmed incumbent or buyer-preferred: SaskTel administers the RFP through the SAP Ariba supplier portal, which is a sourcing platform, not proof SAP Ariba is the current provider. There is zero visibility into scoring or Zycus's rank because no vendor presentation or feedback has occurred, so all four sit as active, roughly equal, medium threats. The single most useful move is to confirm shortlist status and pull scoring feedback; the wedge is Merlin/Agentic AI against SaskTel's self-rated Very Critical AI criterion.

competitors.name: Coupa
competitors.quote: Listed as a shortlisted competitor on the SaskTel S2P RFP; no buyer preference or pricing intel on record.
competitors.how_we_win: Contrast Merlin agentic sourcing and negotiation intelligence against Coupa on SaskTel's Very Critical AI criterion in the vendor presentation.

competitors.name: GEP Worldwide
competitors.quote: Listed as a shortlisted competitor on the SaskTel S2P RFP; no buyer preference or pricing intel on record.
competitors.how_we_win: Position productized S2P plus Merlin over GEP's consulting-led model, showing faster time-to-value for a telecom procurement team.

competitors.name: JAGGAER
competitors.quote: Listed as a shortlisted competitor on the SaskTel S2P RFP; no buyer preference or pricing intel on record.
competitors.how_we_win: Match suite breadth on the RFP checklist, then win on the Agentic AI Insights tier SaskTel rated Very Critical.

competitors.name: SAP Ariba
competitors.quote: Listed as a shortlisted competitor; SaskTel administers the RFP via the Ariba supplier portal, which is the sourcing platform, not confirmed incumbency.
competitors.how_we_win: Lead with modern AI procurement intelligence and lower total cost versus a heavier SAP footprint; do not concede incumbency that evidence does not confirm.

champion_strength.source: SF OpportunityContactRole; SF Next_Step__c; Avoma call 2025-01-28
champion_strength.summary: No champion identified. Adriel Picard owns the RFP but shows no advocacy, internal intel sharing, or introductions to a budget owner, and Jeffrey Buzila has gone quiet for ~79 days after a single delay email. The relationship is transactional and cooling, and the sole recorded call (28 January 2025) was social small talk with no business content. Without a champion, the deal is at high risk of a silent loss at down-selection.

sources: SF OpportunityContactRole (Adriel Picard: Director of Procurement, Decision Maker; Jeffrey Buzila: no role)
SF Opportunity custom fields (no EB/sponsor field populated)
meddpicc_economic_buyer.narrative: No economic buyer is identified or engaged after 520 days. The most senior mapped contact is Adriel Picard, Director of Procurement and the primary Decision Maker on the contact roles, but a procurement director in a telecom of SaskTel's size rarely owns final budget sign-off on a multi-year S2P platform. Jeffrey Buzila's 14 April 2026 reference to closing year-end books points to a finance approval gate whose owner (a CFO or VP Finance) has never been named or contacted. The move is to ask Adriel to name and introduce the budget owner, and to map the finance approver before any commercial step.

recommended_moves: Email Adriel Picard to confirm Zycus's shortlist status and request the scoring feedback.
Ask Adriel to name and introduce the budget owner behind the year-end finance gate.
Offer SaskTel a tailored Merlin and Agentic AI Insights session tied to their RFP AI criterion.
